_comment: Windows 11 fresh-install default taskbar pins and taskbar features. Used by the tray-taskbar module to distinguish 'OEM/Windows default pin the user never asked for' from 'user-pinned app the user actively uses'. Anything in this list that has zero launches per UserAssist is a strong candidate to unpin. Fields: id, name, kind (pin | taskbar_feature), reason, safeToUnpinDefault (bool).
_matchRule: For pins, Win11 stores taskbar layout in %APPDATA%\Microsoft\Internet Explorer\Quick Launch\User Pinned\TaskBar\ (shortcuts) + a per-user binary blob (FavoritesResolve or newer). Detection is unreliable across 24H2 builds — see backlog.md 'tray-taskbar pinned-app manipulation on Win11 24H2'.
_apiRisk: Programmatic unpin on Windows 11 is not officially supported in PowerShell — the classic verb-invoke path (Shell.Application 'unpinfromtaskbar') was removed in 22H2. Fallback: modify the pinned-taskbar binary state and restart Explorer. Fragile — always snapshot the current binary state first.

default_pins.name: Microsoft Edge
default_pins.reason: Ships pinned. Keep if Edge is the primary browser; unpin if the user runs Chrome / Firefox.

default_pins.name: Microsoft Store
default_pins.reason: Ships pinned. Most users open the Store once every few months.

default_pins.name: Widgets
default_pins.reason: Ships enabled. News/weather/stock widget bar. Registry: HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\TaskbarDa = 0 to hide.

default_pins.name: Chat (Microsoft Teams personal)
default_pins.reason: Ships enabled. Deprecated for consumer Teams. Registry: HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\TaskbarMn = 0 to hide.

default_pins.name: Copilot
default_pins.reason: Ships enabled on 23H2+ builds. Windows Copilot button. Registry: HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\ShowCopilotButton = 0.
default_pins.verify: Registry key name — Microsoft has renamed the Copilot button toggle multiple times across builds

default_pins.name: Search box
default_pins.reason: Ships as full search box. Registry: HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Search\SearchboxTaskbarMode. 0 = hidden, 1 = icon only, 2 = icon+label, 3 = full box. Recommend 1 (icon-only) for a cleaner bar without losing search.

default_pins.name: Task View
default_pins.reason: Virtual-desktop switcher button. Registry: HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\ShowTaskViewButton = 0 to hide.
